title: 4 Pack Metal Makeup Spatula, Mini Spoon, Beauty Scoop for Facial Cosmetic, Face Mask (Silver & Gold)
description:
About this item
【USAGE】2 piece silver, gold, metal spatulas each, great for testing, mixing and applying lotion, cream, moisturizers, facial mask or other skincare products.
【WELL-DESIGNED】The little spoons are easy to clean without putting fingers in the jar, you can put the spoons in the plsatic storage box after use.
【REUSABLE】Metal spatula is much stronger and more durable than plastic spoons, which can be reused after cleaning.
【FEATURES】The applicator is made of the metal alloy, smooth and long-lasting, good weight, looks mini and cute, there is a small hole at the end of the spatula for easy hanging.
【SERVICE】If you receive a damaged item, please tell us, and we will do everything to make you satisfied with your purchase.
reviews_5s:
These spatulas are excellent and I will probably order more. They are the right size, the scoop isn't too large, plus, they add a little bit of glamour. They won't break easily and are not flimsy. I highly recommend these spatulas,Play Video
I love the quality of these and you get a container to store the ones you are not using yet. Helps to get face scrub or anything really that is in a tub. Nice to not spread bacteria and get things stuck under your nails. Cleans off easy too. Small but mighty!Made of a metal material. Heavy/sturdy. They come in a little case perfect for travel. Love them for my tallow creams.These are excellent little spoons. I hate sticking my fingers in my products and contaminating them. These are perfect for my Coconut Butter and facial products. I like that they are small and you only get just the right amount of products on your spoon. They are easy to clean, easy to store and make my nightly ritual much more sanitary! Thank You! I highly recommend them.I don't like sticking my fingers into my skincare jars as it feels like it contaminates the product. However, I found these spatulas to be a perfect solution for that. They are of good size and come in a plastic box for storage. Moreover, it's a great value for the price.These little spoons are so great for using on those product tubs that you don’t want to have to dip your fingers into all the time. They get just enough product out so you don’t feel like you are wasting any. I keep two on my counter and travel with two in my makeup bag.These mini spatulas are easy to use with my cream skincare products and are a great way to avoid cross contamination. To clean, I simply add a tiny amount of soap onto the spatula and wash with water. I don't have any cons for these. I highly recommend this product.I love these for when i am scooping cleansing balm from the containers. So much better than using my fingersEasy to use and adorable additions to a skincare routine. Came as described and durableIt is small but I find it's the perfect size for my moisturizer and lip scrub. It is sturdy and would recommend this product.
reviews_1s: I ordered these for my lotion because I enjoy having my nails done but can't stand lotion being under them. They are a lot smaller than I expected and the order was supposed to have FOUR spoons and only THREE came with it. I'm extremely unhappy with this purchase.These little spoons are just that... little. I failed to read the dimensions so when I got them I was a little disappointed. They're very well made and pretty too but just too small for scooping out my moisturizer and getting to the bottom of the jar.
